payload.answer: Not storing: 'He prefers the other one' contains an unresolved reference ('the other one') with no identifiable target entity.

entity_resolution.reason: Input contains an unresolved pronoun ('the other one') without prior entity context, so the preferred item cannot be identified reliably for durable storage.

payload.intent: Capture preference described by pronoun reference

details: Skipped durable memory due to unresolved pronoun/entity reference.

repair_options: Provide the antecedent or list the two options so 'the other one' can be resolved (e.g., 'He prefers the tea over coffee; he prefers the other one' ).
Specify who 'he' refers to and what 'the other one' is (name/label/ID).
Rewrite with explicit nouns: 'He prefers [X] over [Y]' or 'He prefers [X]' alone.
